firebaseAuth.proof: Role login tests for admin, owner, tenant, technician, broker.

firestoreRules.proof: Emulator test output and deployed rules version.

storageRules.proof: Owner, tenant, technician, admin, auditor upload/read-denial evidence.

firebaseFunctions.proof: Functions build/deploy logs, region, callable permission checks.

firebaseCloudMessaging.proof: Android foreground/background and iOS PWA token delivery screenshots/logs.

googleMaps.proof: Billing enabled, restricted key, map render, geocode/GPS tests.

aiVisionOrTriage.proof: Backend-only secret, confidence fallback, Arabic/English triage tests.

paymentGatewayOrManualBank.proof: Chosen gateway/manual bank flow, webhook or admin verification tests, VAT wording.

whatsappBusiness.proof: Business verification, templates, opt-in, send logs.

smsVoiceFallback.proof: Carrier approval, cost control, emergency fallback test.

uaeDataResidencyPosition.proof: Documented data categories, subprocessors, hosting region, retention policy.

allowedWaiverFormat.riskNote: Explicit operational risk accepted for pilot only
